bash_commands.command: cd /workspace/kubernetes && find staging/src/k8s.io/api/ pkg/apis/ -name "*.go" -type f | wc -l

grep -rn "Deprecated" staging/src/k8s.io/api/ pkg/apis/ --include="*.go" | grep -E "(const|var|[A-Z][a-zA-Z]*Deprecated[a-zA-Z0-9]*\s)" | grep -v "//\|APILifecycleDeprecated\|generated.pb.go\|zz_generated" | cut -d: -f1 | sort | uniq
grep -rn "^\s*[A-Za-z]*Deprecated[A-Za-z0-9]*\s*=" staging/src/k8s.io/api/ pkg/apis/ --include="*.go" | grep -v "//\|APILifecycleDeprecated\|generated.pb.go\|zz_generated" | cut -d: -f1 | sort | uniq

grep -rn "^\s*[A-Za-z]*Deprecated[A-Za-z0-9]*\s\+[a-zA-Z*]" staging/src/k8s.io/api/ pkg/apis/ --include="*.go" | grep -v "//\|APILifecycleDeprecated\|generated.pb.go\|zz_generated" | cut -d: -f1 | sort | uniq

find staging/src/k8s.io/api/ pkg/apis/ -name "*.go" -type f -exec grep -l "[A-Za-z]*Deprecated[A-Za-z0-9]*\s" {} \; 2>/dev/null | grep -v "generated.pb.go\|zz_generated\|types_swagger_doc" | while read f; do grep -n "^\s*[A-Za-z]*Deprecated[A-Za-z0-9]*\s" "$f" | grep -v "//" && echo "File: $f"; done | uniq
